ddls:
CREATE TABLE "oceans" (
  "ocean_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ocean */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ocean */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the ocean */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the ocean in square kilometers */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the associated image */,
  "average_depth" REAL /* Average depth of the ocean */,
  "maximum_depth" REAL /* Maximum depth of the ocean */,
  "unique_species_count" INTEGER /* Number of unique marine species in the ocean */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last comprehensive survey */,
  "nearest_continents" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of nearest continents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ocean_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental metric */,
  "ocean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ocean the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the environmental metric (e.g., temperature, salinity) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the metric was measured */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the metric */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Specific location where the metric was measured */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the measurement */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project associated with the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_ocean_id FOREIGN KEY ("ocean_id") REFERENCES oceans ("ocean_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marine_life" (
  "life_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marine life entry */,
  "ocean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ocean the marine life is associated with */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of marine life */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the population was measured */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project associated with the marine life data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("life_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_life_ocean_id FOREIGN KEY ("ocean_id") REFERENCES oceans ("ocean_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_life_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "project_keywords" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of keywords for the project */,
  "project_outcomes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of expected outcomes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_principal_investigator FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_oceans" (
  "project_ocean_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-ocean link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "ocean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ocean being studied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_ocean_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_oceans_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_oceans_ocean_id FOREIGN KEY ("ocean_id") REFERENCES oceans ("ocean_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project (e.g., PI, co-PI, researcher) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Field of specialization of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of research interests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_researchers" (
  "project_researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-researcher link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher involved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_researchers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_researchers_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file content */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the file */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project outcome */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of the outcome (e.g., publication, report, dataset) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was reported */,
  "outcome_url" TEXT /* URL or file path to the outcome */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Brief description of the impact of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_outcomes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
